title: Choose the Right Status Code
prompt_md:
Picking the correct status code is part of API design. Write `choose_status(method, found)` returning the right HTTP status as an **int** for these cases:

- `GET` and the resource exists (`found` is `True`) -> `200`
- `GET` and it doesn't exist (`found` is `False`) -> `404`
- `POST` (a create) -> `201`
- `DELETE` -> `204`

Assume `method` is one of `"GET"`, `"POST"`, `"DELETE"`.
hints: For "GET", branch on the found flag: 200 if found else 404.
"DELETE" always returns 204 (No Content) — there's nothing to send back.
